title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese presents six skills for maximizing Claude projects: web scraping for data discovery, ingest-source for knowledge base capture, improve-system for iterative refinement, ask-the-board for multi-perspective review, internal-focus-group for testing, and compound engineering for shipping. He demonstrates these in sequence while building a fitness trainer project.
